content:
I’ve learned so much from the rich Hispanic and African American community that populates my current job at PBSC.
I will not pretend to dislike the canon of Classics—however, now when I see someone’s syllabus that is all male, or all white it makes me wonder why that choice was made, be it intentionally or unintentionally. I am proud to be part of a generation that is in such a state of tantamount change. When we realize that J.K. Rowling is only J.K. because it was thought that boys won’t buy a female’s author’s book that I realized I most certainly had problematic personal biases.
